🔄 Content Updated (Published: April 14, 2026)

Tanabata Concert

Enjoy music at the Citizen Activity Center!

Date and Time: July 5, 2026 (Sunday, Reiwa 8) 2:00 p.m.–3:00 p.m.

Location: Hanno City Citizen Activity Center, Multi-Purpose Hall

Performers: Bell Époque

Program: Flute and Piano Ensemble

Capacity: 80 people

Application Period: From June 12, 2026 (Friday, Reiwa 8)

Registration closes when capacity is reached. If spaces remain available, same-day admission is possible.

How to Apply: By telephone

Contact the Citizen Activity Center at 042-978-7551.

• A Tanabata Festival exhibition will be held from June 26, 2026 (Friday) to July 7, 2026 (Tuesday), so please visit at that time as well.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jitishinkoka/shiminkatudou/11274.html
